productDisplayName: Paris Hilton Men Just Me Perfume
description: Style NoteThis flirty and very alluring fragrance from paris hilton adds a seductive touch to the impression you'll make on a first date. Perfectly complementing the masculine you, this is one scent you don't want to miss!Product DetailsParis Hilton's Just Me for men carries the notes of violet, lily of the valley, white rose, Tahitian vanilla and musk and comes in an elegant glass flask Size50 ml
